query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_projects, SUM(CASE WHEN matchedBusinessLines IS NOT NULL AND JSON_CONTAINS(matchedBusinessLines, '1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_portable_air, SUM(CASE WHEN location LIKE '%WA%' OR location LIKE '%Western Australia%' OR location LIKE '%Perth%' OR location LIKE '%Pilbara%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as in_wa FROM projects WHERE lifecycleStatus = 'active' OR lifecycleStatus IS NULL LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_projects, SUM(CASE WHEN matchedBusinessLines IS NOT NULL AND JSON_CONTAINS(matchedBusinessLines, '1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_portable_air, SUM(CASE WHEN location LIKE '%WA%' OR location LIKE '%Western Australia%' OR location LIKE '%Perth%' OR location LIKE '%Pilbara%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as in_wa FROM projects WHERE lifecycleStatus = 'active' OR lifecycleStatus IS NULL LIMIT 1;
